Surah Al-Fatihah (The Opening) is the first chapter of the Holy Quran. It is often referred to as the "Essence of the Quran" and is recited in every unit of the Muslim prayer (Salah). This surah contains seven verses and is a prayer for guidance, lordship, and mercy. It establishes the fundamental relationship between Allah and His servants, teaching them to seek the straight path of those who have received Allah's blessings, not the path of those who have earned His anger or gone astray.
